items.title: Wolf
items.description: Classic Garou form; pack-oriented predator

items.title: Dire Wolf
items.description: Larger, more primal and ancient wolf aspect

items.title: Dog
items.description: Domesticated canine, tied to human environments

items.title: Coyote
items.description: Adaptable scavenger and trickster

items.title: Fox
items.description: Cunning, stealthy, and elusive

items.title: Bear
items.description: Massive strength, endurance, and ferocity

items.title: Wolverine
items.description: Small but extremely aggressive and resilient

items.title: Hyena
items.description: Pack scavenger with eerie intelligence

items.title: Lion
items.description: Dominant apex predator, symbol of authority

items.title: Tiger
items.description: Solitary, powerful ambush hunter

items.title: Panther
items.description: Stealth-focused predator of the night

items.title: Eagle
items.description: Keen sight, dominance of the skies

items.title: Raven
items.description: Associated with death, secrets, and trickery

items.title: Owl
items.description: Silent hunter, tied to wisdom and the night

items.title: Snake
items.description: Subtle, patient, and often symbolic of corruption or wisdom

items.title: Spider
items.description: Weaver of traps, patience, and control

items.title: Stag
items.description: Nobility, nature, and territorial dominance

items.title: Boar
items.description: Stubborn resilience and raw aggression

items.title: Shark
items.description: Relentless predator of the depths

items.title: Crocodile
items.description: Ancient ambush predator

items.title: Rat
items.description: Survival, infestation, and urban adaptation

items.title: Bat
items.description: Night creature with heightened perception

items.title: Sense Wyrm
items.description: Detects corruption, taint, or supernatural evil

items.title: Heightened Senses
items.description: Enhances sight, smell, or hearing

items.title: Truth of Gaia
items.description: Reveals lies or deception

items.title: Rage Strength
items.description: Temporarily increases physical power

items.title: Spirit Claws
items.description: Allows attacks to harm supernatural beings

items.title: Berserk Fury
items.description: Enter a controlled rage for combat advantage

items.title: Resist Pain
items.description: Ignore wound penalties

items.title: Tough Hide
items.description: Increase resistance to damage

items.title: Rapid Healing
items.description: Accelerates natural regeneration

items.title: Burst of Speed
items.description: Move at supernatural velocity

items.title: Great Leap
items.description: Jump great distances

items.title: Step Sideways
items.description: Enter the spirit world (Umbra)

items.title: Commanding Voice
items.description: Force obedience or attention

items.title: Calm the Beast
items.description: Reduce rage or aggression in others

items.title: Instill Fear
items.description: Cause supernatural terror

items.title: Spirit Speech
items.description: Communicate with spirits

items.title: Bind Spirit
items.description: Force a spirit into service or containment

items.title: Spirit Blessing
items.description: Gain temporary power from spirits

items.title: Weather Control
items.description: Influence local weather conditions

items.title: Command Animals
items.description: Influence or control beasts

items.title: Earth Call
items.description: Manipulate soil, roots, or terrain

items.title: Blend
items.description: Become difficult to notice in natural surroundings

items.title: Silent Movement
items.description: Move without making noise

items.title: Alternate Form
items.description: Take on unusual or enhanced forms

items.title: Pack Bond
items.description: Strengthen supernatural connection between allies

items.title: Gaia's Wrath
items.description: Channel destructive natural force against enemies

items.title: Wyrm Taint
items.description: Tainted by wyrm, the protector becomes the corruptor

items.title: Tainting Touch
items.description: Infuses a target with Wyrm corruption, weakening their spirit or causing moral decay

items.title: Corrupt Spirit
items.description: Twists or enslaves spirits, turning them hostile or unstable

items.title: Mark of the Wyrm
items.description: Brands a target, making them easier to track and more vulnerable to corruption

items.title: Accelerated Rot
items.description: Causes organic matter to decay rapidly, including flesh and plant life

items.title: Withering Body
items.description: Weakens a target physically, draining vitality and strength

items.title: Blight
items.description: Corrupts land or environment, making it toxic and lifeless

items.title: Warp Flesh
items.description: Mutates the user’s body into a more monstrous or powerful form

items.title: Twist Form
items.description: Forces grotesque mutations onto another being

items.title: Toxic Blood
items.description: Turns blood into a poisonous or corrosive substance

items.title: Induce Madness
items.description: Drives a target into paranoia, fear, or insanity

items.title: Nightmare Infliction
items.description: Assaults a target’s mind with horrific visions

items.title: Whispers of the Wyrm
items.description: Implants corrupting thoughts or compulsions

items.title: Corrupt Command
items.description: Forces obedience through fear and spiritual domination

items.title: Break the Pack
items.description: Disrupts bonds between allies, causing distrust and conflict

items.title: Corrosive Strike
items.description: Attacks inflict additional decay or acid-like damage

items.title: Unleashed Frenzy
items.description: Enter a violent, uncontrollable rage with increased power

items.title: Aura of Corruption
items.description: Damages or weakens nearby beings over time

items.title: Tainted Umbra
items.description: Corrupts the spirit world around the user

items.title: Summon Bane
items.description: Calls a Wyrm-spirit to aid or serve temporarily

items.title: Bind Bane
items.description: Forces a corrupted spirit into service

items.title: Avatar of the Wyrm
items.description: Transforms the user into a powerful corrupted entity

items.title: Devour Spirit
items.description: Consumes spirits to gain power

items.title: Seed of Ruin
items.description: Spreads large-scale corruption across an area
